content: Hi, I'm Skyler, a cybersecurity consultant from California. I've recently started a side project, a YouTube channel focused on drone photography.
That sounds like a great hobby! What inspired you to start your YouTube channel?
I've always been interested in photography and flying drones. I thought it would be a great way to combine my passions and share my experiences with others.
That's a great idea! Drone photography can be a lot of fun. How do you balance your work and your side project?
It can be challenging, but I try to dedicate a few hours each day to my channel. I also enjoy home brewing beer in my free time, it helps me relax.
Home brewing can be a great hobby! It's wonderful that you're finding ways to manage your stress. What's your favorite type of beer to brew?
I'm a big fan of IPAs. I love experimenting with different hops and flavors to create unique brews.
IPAs are a popular choice! It's great that you're experimenting with different flavors. How do you stay active and healthy, especially with a desk job?
I try to prioritize my fitness by going for runs and practicing speedcubing. It helps me clear my mind and stay focused.
Speedcubing is a great way to challenge yourself and improve your problem-solving skills. What's your personal best time for solving a Rubik's Cube?
My personal best is around 20 seconds. I'm trying to get faster, but it's not easy!
That's impressive! It takes a lot of practice to get that fast. Keep up the good work and don't forget to take care of your physical health too.
Thanks for the advice. I'm actually planning to participate in a speedcubing competition next month in San Francisco.
That's exciting! Good luck with the competition. Make sure to get plenty of rest and stay hydrated before the event.
